data.title: CZ injects bilateral liquidity into TST/WBNB trading pair worth $200
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of Ai Yi, an analyst on the chain, 1 minute ago, CZ injected 1110.99 TEST and 0.096 WBNB bilateral liquidity into the TST/WBNB trading pair, worth about $200.

data.title: Justin Sun: Safety is a "top priority" and we must always be vigilant and keep learning
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Sun Yuchen, global consultant of Huobi HTX and founder of TRON, shared his profound insights on exchange security in the Twitter Space with the theme of "Industry crisis, how to deal with it together? Is there an optimal solution for the security of the crypto industry?" He said that it is obvious that hacker attack methods are constantly evolving, from hot wallet attacks to multi-signature wallet attacks. Exchanges must always be vigilant and dynamically improve security protection. In his view, security is a "top priority project". Awe and learning are the key to maintaining security. We must always be humble, vigilant, and learn forever, which will ultimately bring eternal security. In addition, security is like personal health management. It cannot rely entirely on external guarantees. Only the exchange's own high attention and security awareness can truly effectively prevent risks and remain invincible in long-term development. Sun Yuchen introduced that for Huobi HTX, users' sense of security is very important. Therefore, it always follows up on crypto security incidents as soon as possible to understand the principles and methods of hackers' attacks in order to effectively prevent them. At the same time, Huobi HTX has also reached cooperation with many white hat teams to conduct attack and defense tests to improve security capabilities. Earlier, at the "TRON & HTX DAO Exchange" in Hong Kong on February 21, Justin Sun shared his security requirements for Huobi HTX. He said that the platform must ensure the security of user assets, especially in terms of multi-signature support and security reminders, and should explore how to better prevent security issues such as label scams.

data.title: CZ: DEX platform is very difficult to use, it took 27 minutes to complete the transaction
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News CZ posted on the X platform: "DEX platform is very difficult to use. It took me 27 minutes to trade successfully, but I still haven't figured out how to add a liquidity pool." 
Previously, CZ failed twice when buying Meme through PancakeSwap.

data.title: Ether Price Rises Amid Bybit Hack Developments
data.description:
According to CoinDesk, the price of ether (ETH), the world's second-largest cryptocurrency, has increased by over 2.3% in the past 24 hours. In contrast, the broader CoinDesk 20 Index saw a modest rise of 0.76%, while Bitcoin experienced a slight decline of approximately 0.3%. This surge in ether's value coincides with reports concerning Bybit, a cryptocurrency exchange recently targeted by a North Korean hacking group known as Lazarus. The hackers reportedly stole $1.5 billion worth of ether and staked ether. In response, Bybit has moved 100 million USDT into new addresses, with half of that amount used to purchase 36,900 ETH over-the-counter.

The funds, estimated to be worth around $101 million, were subsequently transferred to addresses identified as belonging to the cryptocurrency exchange, as reported by crypto journalist Colin Wu, citing data from Arkham Intelligence. Bybit's CEO, Ben Zhou, addressed the situation in a public "ask me anything" session, asserting that the company's assets exceed $1.5 billion. He further revealed that Bybit maintains a cold wallet containing nearly $3 billion in USDT, ensuring the company's financial stability.

The hacker responsible for the breach now holds an estimated 489,000 ETH, valued at approximately $1.34 billion, which represents about 0.4% of ether's total supply. This makes the hacker the 14th-largest holder of the cryptocurrency. The addresses linked to the hacker are under close surveillance and have been blacklisted by major cryptocurrency exchanges. StealthEX CEO Maria Carola explained that the stolen funds have been marked, making it extremely challenging for the hacker to utilize them. Any attempt to transfer these funds to a major exchange would likely result in an immediate block.

Given the difficulty the hacker faces in using the stolen ether, some analysts suggest that the 0.4% of the ETH supply held by the hacker is effectively out of circulation. This situation highlights the ongoing challenges and complexities within the cryptocurrency space, particularly concerning security and asset recovery.

data.title: BNB Surpasses 660 USDT with a 0.57% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Feb 22, 2025, 16:46 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has crossed the 660 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 660.570007 USDT, with a narrowed 0.57% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Dogecoin Whales Go On A 110-Million Memecoin Buying Spree—What’s Next For DOGE?
data.description:
Dogecoin whales have executed a substantial transaction in the last two days, purchasing 110 million DOGE while the price of the meme coin declined. This systematic accumulation has attracted the interest of experts and traders, igniting discussions regarding a possible price reversal. With DOGE presently trading at $0.25, many are speculating whether this may indicate a forthcoming bullish...

data.title: Asteroid's Earth Impact Odds Plummet, Scientists Now Playing the Long Wait Game
data.description:
Latest observations slash collision probability for asteroid 2024 YR4 from 2.8% to 0.16%, but no further updates are possible until 2028.

data.title: CZ donation address bought 1.005 BNB TST twice in the past 5 minutes
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to Ai Yi, an analyst on the chain, CZ's donation address bought 1.005 BNB of TST twice in the past 5 minutes, worth $662. Market data shows that TST has soared 40% in a short period of time, and its market value has exceeded $100 million again, now reporting $118 million. 
Previously, the transaction failed when CZ's address bought TST for the first time.

data.title: Lazarus Strikes Again? $1.4B Bybit Hack Rocks Crypto as Exchange Scrambles for 63K ETH Loan
data.description:
"Lazarus Strikes Again? A staggering $1.4 billion hack on Bybit shakes the cryptocurrency world, as the exchange urgently seeks a loan of 63,000 ETH to stabilize its operations and recover from this massive breach."
source: https://voiceofcrypto.online/latest-news/lazarus-strikes-again-14b-bybit-hack-rocks-crypto-as-exchange-scrambles-for-63k-eth-loan
